title: Contact - Alex Baker MP | Aldershot
meta_description: I intend to be the most visible and accessible MP that this constituency has ever had, and you will see me out and about on the doorstep and at community events and at my surgeries all year round. I am keen to hear what you think my priorities should be as your MP and what matters most to you.
text_excerpt: Contact - Alex Baker MP | Aldershot >>>>>>>>> (Gropup 1 - Necessary Cookies) >>>>>>>>> End (Gropup 1 - Necessary Cookies) Find me on Facebook 020 7219 4085 Email Me HOME ABOUT NEWS CAMPAIGNS Aldershot and Farnborough Labour’s Missions COMMUNITY SURVEY HELP Contact Useful Links Visit Parliament Privacy Policy CONTACT Would you like to find out more about my campaigns? Please use the contact form below to get in touch. I intend to be the most visible and accessible MP that this constituency has ever had, and you will see me out and about all year round, on the doorstep, at community events and at my surgeries. I am keen to hear what you think my priorities should be as your MP and what matters most to you. I can also help you with issues such as benefits, housing, immigration, the NHS and education. I aim to respond promptly to everyone, but please remember that I have to prioritise constituents with the most urgent or pressing issues. Campaign or policy issues may take a bit longer. There is also a list of other agencies that may help you here . Please use the contact form to get in touch with me. Remember to provide as many details of your issue as possible, and include your name, address, phone number and postcode. Alternatively, you can write to me at: Alex Baker MP, House of Commons, London, SW1A 0AA. 020 7219 4085 alex.baker.mp@parliament.uk Contact Newsletter First Name Last Name Phone/Mobile Your Address (inc. Please remember to provide as much details as possible, including your full contact details.
